title: lycopodium clavatum var. fastigiatum
intro: Lycopodium clavatum var. fastigiatum, also known as club moss or slow-growing club moss, is a variety of the lycopodium clavatum plant, a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida class. Traditionally, Lycopodium clavatum var. fastigiatum has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Lycopodium clavatum var. fastigiatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
